title: xo's pack vanilla
description: CPVP Optimizer pack with multi-function. Download free now. Join my discord for more pack
body:
<details>
<summary>Feature</summary>

- Small totem and small totem pop
- No explosion effect
- No potion effect
- Low shield
- Durability armor *
- Smooth font
- Bow, Crossbow Load Indicator
- Clear water
- No pumpkin blur
- Low fire and No fire overlay
- Blue ancient debris
- Border ore
- and more ...

</details>


**Note:** If you are Optifine player, you don't need care this but you are Fabric player you need use [CIT mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for Feature (Durability armor) can work
